Rhyolite Ridge Lithium-Boron Mine
DOE finalized $996M loan guarantee (including $968M principal and $28M capitalized interest). Expected to quadruple U.S. domestic lithium supply and support 370,000 EVs annually.
Thacker Pass Lithium Mine
Largest known lithium deposit in North America. DOE took 5% equity stake. Phase 1 targeting 40,000 t/yr by late 2027. First $435M DOE draw received.
Mountain Pass Rare Earth Processing
Only active rare earth mine in U.S.
Rare Earth Processing Facility
Light rare earth separation facility
Lithium Processing Expansion
Kings Mountain lithium refining capacity expansion
Battery Recycling Campus
Recover cobalt, lithium, nickel, copper from batteries
Phoenix Fab Complex (3 fabs)
Leading-edge 2nm/3nm node. Largest foreign investment in AZ history
Ohio Fab Complex
Two leading-edge fabs. $100B total Intel investment
Taylor TX Fab Expansion
Advanced logic and R&D fab
Syracuse NY Memory Fab
First new memory fab in U.S. in 20 years
Stibnite Gold-Antimony Mine
Only significant antimony deposit in U.S. DOD invested ~$60M in permitting support. $1.8B Ex-Im Bank letter of interest.
Iron-Air Battery Factory
100-hour duration iron-air batteries
Battery Cathode Manufacturing
Recycled cathode active materials from batteries
Graphite Creek Mine + Processing
Largest known graphite deposit in U.S.
Domestic Tungsten Processing
Tungsten powder and carbide production
Mesquite TX 155mm Shell Plant
Titanium Metal Production
Novel titanium powder production process
Submarine Industrial Base Investment
Domestic Niobium Oxide Production
First U.S. niobium oxide production in over 30 years. Precursor for superalloys in aircraft and rocket systems.
Domestic Tin Smelting and Refining Facility
Comprehensive tin smelting, refining, and recycling. Critical for soldering in defense electronics.
Germanium Substrate Production for Space Solar Cells
Space-qualified germanium wafers for satellite solar cells. St. George, UT facility upgrade.
Domestic Gallium and Scandium Supply
Demonstration facility in Gramercy, LA to extract gallium and scandium from industrial waste.
Elk Creek Critical Minerals Project
Mine-to-manufacture supply chain for scandium, niobium, and titanium in southeast Nebraska.
Vidalia Graphite Active Anode Material Facility
First U.S. facility producing graphite-based active anode material for EV batteries.
Chattanooga Synthetic Graphite Plant
31,500 MT/year synthetic graphite for ~325,000 EVs. Currently imported almost exclusively from China.
Cobalt Strategic Reserve Acquisition
Pentagon $500M cobalt stockpiling initiative over five years, part of $7.5B critical minerals program.
Antimony Strategic Reserve Acquisition
Part of $1B Pentagon stockpile. Antimony critical for ammunition primers and flame retardants.
Tantalum Strategic Reserve Acquisition
Part of $1B Pentagon stockpile. Tantalum essential for capacitors in defense electronics.
Scandium Strategic Reserve Acquisition
Part of $1B Pentagon stockpile. Scandium used in aerospace aluminum alloys.
Anode Material Manufacturing
48C credit for synthetic graphite anode material production for EV batteries.
Rare Earth Magnet Manufacturing
Rare earth permanent magnet factory. Currently 90%+ of magnets made in China.
By-Product Critical Minerals Recovery at Industrial Facilities
Mine of the Future Proving Grounds
Kings Mountain Lithium Mine Reopening
Reopen Kings Mountain lithium mine to reduce dependence on foreign lithium sources.
FY2025 National Defense Stockpile Expansion
Rare Earth Mine-to-Magnet Independence Partnership
DOD $400M preferred equity investment making Pentagon largest shareholder. Includes 10-year magnet offtake agreement for 100% of production.
Mountain Pass Heavy Rare Earth Separation
DOD $150M loan for heavy rare earth separation at Mountain Pass. Part of mine-to-magnet partnership.
SmCo and NdFeB Permanent Magnet Manufacturing Plant
First U.S. rare earth permanent magnet manufacturing facility in decades. 300 workers. Sumter County, SC.
Advanced Energy Project Tax Credit for Magnet Plant
Qualified Advanced Energy Project Tax Credit for SmCo and NdFeB magnet manufacturing in Sumter County, SC.
Texas Heavy Rare Earth Separation Facility
DOD-funded $120M facility producing dysprosium and terbium for defense magnets. Expected operational 2026.
Titanium Manufacturing Campus Scale-Up
Industrial Base Analysis and Sustainment program award. Targets 2,000 tpa by end 2026 and 10,000 tpa by 2030.
Low-Cost Domestic Titanium for Defense Applications
SBIR Phase III indefinite-delivery contract ceiling of $99M for defense-grade titanium production.
GaN-on-Silicon Chip Manufacturing
DOD Trusted Access Program Office award for GaN manufacturing at Essex Junction, VT. Volume production targeted late 2026.
Domestic Gallium Production R&D
DOE Office of Fossil Energy and Carbon Management funding for domestic gallium extraction from aluminum processing byproducts.
Idaho Cobalt Operations Expansion Study
Pentagon invested $15M in DPA Title III funds for feasibility studies on expanding the only primary U.S. cobalt mine. Targeting Q2 2026 restart at 1,500 t/yr.
DRC Copper and Cobalt Venture
U.S. International Development Finance Corporation $1B+ commitment for DRC critical minerals and railway infrastructure to build non-Chinese supply chains.
Domestic LEU and HALEU Enrichment Expansion
Congressional appropriation unlocked by Russian uranium import ban for domestic LEU and HALEU production. Largest federal enrichment investment since Cold War.
HALEU Production at Piketon, Ohio
DOE HALEU task order for American Centrifuge Plant. Centrus is only U.S.-owned company with operational enrichment technology. First new production capacity expected 2029.
Domestic Nickel Prospecting in Minnesota and Michigan
DOD award for nickel prospecting work supporting Talon nickel mine and domestic nickel resource identification.
Domestic Scandium Production Development
DOD awarded $10M to develop domestic scandium supply. NioCorp targets 100 t/yr scandium — triple current global non-Chinese supply. Partnered with Lockheed Martin.
Pilot Mountain Tungsten Mine Development
Largest undeveloped tungsten deposit in the U.S. Exploration and feasibility studies funded by DOD.
U.S.-Australia Critical Minerals Framework Agreement
$1B each near-term investment plus $2.2B EXIM letters of interest. Supports Lynas and Australian rare earth processing expansion outside China.
CHIPS Act Total Deployment — 32 Projects in 20 States
Nearly $34B of $39B available in direct funding plus ~$29B in loans across 32 semiconductor manufacturing projects. Does not address upstream silicon material supply.
Stibnite Gold-Antimony Exploration
DOD awarded $15.5M for exploration at Stibnite Gold Project. Could meet 35% of U.S. antimony demand in first six years of operation.
Stibnite Gold-Antimony Mine Development
Export-Import Bank $1.8B letter of interest for Stibnite development. Only prospective U.S. antimony mine.
